title: Pvt Ltd Registration in Odisha | Virtual Auditor
description: Pvt Ltd Registration in Odisha. From ₹8,999. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Private limited company registration under Companies Act 201. Contact +91 99622 60333.
bodyText:
What is private limited company registration? Private limited company registration under Companies Act 2013. SPICe+ filing, DSC, DIN, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN.
Private Limited Company Registration is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Odisha, Odisha since 2012.
Quick Answer: Pvt Ltd Registration in Odisha — Private limited company registration under Companies Act 2013. SPICe+ filing, DSC, DIN, MOA/AOA, PAN. From ₹8,999. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Private Limited Company Registration in Odisha
Virtual Auditor provides private limited company registration across Odisha. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Odisha with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Cuttack handles company registrations and filings for Odisha. Stamp duty: As per state schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

HEADING2: Our Service Scope
• SPICe+ Form Filing (INC-32)
• DSC & DIN for Directors
• Name Reservation (RUN/SPICe+ Part A)
• MOA & AOA Drafting
• PAN/TAN Allotment
• Post-Incorporation Compliance Setup

HEADING2: Step-by-Step Process
• 1
HEADING3: Step 1: Obtain DSC
Digital Signature Certificate for all directors
• 2
HEADING3: Step 2: Reserve Company Name
Via SPICe+ Part A or RUN form
• 3
HEADING3: Step 3: File SPICe+ Part B
Integrated incorporation form INC-32
• 4
HEADING3: Step 4: Receive Certificate
Certificate of Incorporation from ROC
• 5
HEADING3: Step 5: Post-Registration
Auditor appointment, INC-20A, bank account

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Odisha
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your pvt ltd registration is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: How much does Pvt Ltd registration cost?
faqs.a: All-inclusive from ₹8,999 covering government fees, DSC, DIN, SPICe+ filing, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. No hidden charges. 5-15 working days.

faqs.q: What documents are needed for company registration?
faqs.a: PAN & Aadhaar of directors, address proof, passport-size photos, registered office address proof (utility bill + NOC/rent agreement), and proposed company name.

faqs.q: How long does company registration take?
faqs.a: 5-15 working days from document submission. Same-day DSC issuance, 2-3 days for name approval, 3-7 days for incorporation certificate.

faqs.q: Do you provide pvt ltd registration services in Odisha?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Odisha from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Odisha?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Odisha fall under ROC Cuttack. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Odisha-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Odisha?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Odisha: As per state schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
